title: Reptonia mascatensis
taxonomy: Reptonia mascatensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the Socotra Archipelago in Yemen. The plant is classified as part of the genus Reptonia, which is a small genus of succulent plants. The classification of Reptonia mascatensis is further detailed in the APG III system of plant taxonomy. The APG III system assigns it to the clade of Angiosperms.
